Bespoke webportal — adapter needs live login. Manual upload meanwhile. NOTE Jul 2026: mpd.smarthub.coop brands 'MPD Electric' but versantpower.com links no SmartHub — single-signal, NOT wired; host left unattributed (needs human review).
